args: const p=process.env.OPENCLAW_REPO_PATH||'lib/openclaw';const fs=require('fs');if(!fs.existsSync(p+'/package.json')){console.error('[openclaw] Monorepo not found at '+p+' — MCP server disabled (standalone mode)');process.exit(0)}const{spawn}=require('child_process');const c=spawn(process.platform==='win32'?'npx.cmd':'npx',['-y','@anthropic-ai/mcp-server-filesystem',p+'/src',p+'/extensions',p+'/docs'],{stdio:'inherit'});c.on('close',code=>process.exit(code||0))
